hooks.statusMessage: 依存パッケージをインストール中...
品質ゲート確認中（typecheck + lint）...

hooks.command: bash -c 'f=$(jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty") 2>/dev/null || exit 0; echo "$f" | grep -qE "\\.(ts|tsx)$" || exit 0; out=$(npm run typecheck 2>&1); [ $? -ne 0 ] && echo "[typecheck] $out" | head -30; if [ -f node_modules/.bin/eslint ]; then out2=$(npm run lint 2>&1); [ $? -ne 0 ] && echo "[lint] $out2" | head -30; else echo "[lint] eslint not installed (run after RN init)"; fi; exit 0'
